candidates.title: Address button uses the wrong label
candidates.actual: The primary button says Save later.

assertions.text: The primary address button says Save later.
Commit synthetic-001 introduced the copy regression in AddressButton.tsx.

acceptance_criteria: The primary button reads Save address.
suggested_verification: Open the synthetic address screen and inspect the label.
uncertainty: No source diff supports the suspected introducing commit or file.

candidates.title: Review summary styling and copy are incorrect
candidates.actual: The heading says Results and the disabled Continue button looks enabled.
candidates.expected: The heading should say Review and disabled Continue should look disabled.

assertions.text: The heading reads Results.
Continue rejects taps while using an enabled visual style.

acceptance_criteria: Disabled Continue has the disabled style.
suggested_verification: Open the summary without a selection.

candidates.title: Schedule card ignores saved time preference
candidates.actual: The first card shows 09:00 after 10:00 was saved.

assertions.text: The first card shows 09:00 and the reporter identifies the saved 10:00 preference.

acceptance_criteria: The first card reflects the saved time preference.
suggested_verification: Save a time and return to the first card.

candidates.title: Archive is missing from the overflow menu

assertions.text: Archive is absent from the overflow menu.

acceptance_criteria: Archive appears in the overflow menu.
suggested_verification: Open a note and its overflow menu.

candidates.title: Delete is missing from the overflow menu

assertions.text: Delete is absent from the overflow menu.

acceptance_criteria: Delete appears in the overflow menu.
suggested_verification: Open a note and its overflow menu.

assertions.text: A large blue temperature card is visible.
The authorized decision is to make the card smaller rather than less bright.

candidates.title: Balance text is truncated
candidates.actual: The balance ends in an ellipsis after the decimal separator.
candidates.expected: The full balance should remain readable.

assertions.text: The visual evidence shows truncation after the decimal separator.
VoiceOver also reads the balance incorrectly.

acceptance_criteria: The full balance is readable at the tested size.
suggested_verification: Inspect the balance visually and run a separate accessibility check.
uncertainty: Transcript wording is low confidence; no VoiceOver evidence exists.

candidates.title: Profile save fails
candidates.actual: Save shows Unable to save profile.
candidates.expected: A valid profile should save or show actionable validation.

assertions.text: Save produces an Unable to save profile banner.
The database rejects a duplicate username.

acceptance_criteria: A valid profile saves or a field-specific error is shown.
suggested_verification: Repeat with an approved synthetic value and inspect bounded backend evidence if authorized.

assertions.text: The recording demonstrates a broken login flow.

candidates.title: Destructive button has the wrong copy

assertions.text: The destructive button reads Publish while the reporter expects Delete.

candidates.title: Retry leaves the offline state unchanged
candidates.actual: Retry leaves the banner and stale content in place.
candidates.expected: Retry should refresh or show an actionable failure.

assertions.text: After Retry, the Offline banner and stale content remain.

acceptance_criteria: Retry visibly retries and refreshes or presents a failure state.
suggested_verification: Exercise Retry against a controlled synthetic 503.
uncertainty: No second request event is available.

candidates.title: Book details navigates to Home
candidates.expected: It should open the selected book detail.

assertions.text: The tap navigates to Home and the frozen source calls navigate('Home').

acceptance_criteria: Book details opens the selected book detail screen.
suggested_verification: Tap Book details in an isolated test build.

candidates.title: Save controls do not work
candidates.actual: Profile Save stays disabled and Payment Save does nothing.

assertions.text: Profile Save remains disabled after valid input.
Enabled Payment Save produces no response.

acceptance_criteria: Payment Save submits or shows a failure.

candidates.title: Play icon overlaps the episode title
candidates.actual: The play icon covers title text.
candidates.expected: The icon and title should not overlap.

assertions.text: The play icon overlaps the title.

acceptance_criteria: The icon and title do not overlap.
suggested_verification: Start an episode and inspect the mini-player.

candidates.title: Mini-player text sits behind play
candidates.actual: Title text sits behind the play control.
candidates.expected: Text should remain beside the play control.

assertions.text: The mini-player text sits behind play.

acceptance_criteria: Text remains beside the play control.

candidates.title: Send remains stuck loading
candidates.expected: Send should complete or show a failure.

assertions.text: Send remains in loading through the available window.
Sentry confirms a backend timeout in POST /messages.

acceptance_criteria: Send completes or shows an actionable failure.
suggested_verification: Repeat with bounded backend evidence only if authorized.
